user.title: Connect to ProfiLux
user.description: For a ProfiLux 3/4 use the HTTP interface. For a ProfiLux mini use WebSocket.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect. Check the host, credentials and interface.

init.title: ProfiLux options
init.description: Socket control writes to the controller and can override the automatic control of live equipment. Leave it off unless you want switches.

data.control_sockets: Enable socket control (adds an on/off switch per socket)
